prestazioni: VQ35DE (3.5L V6 NA, 280hp stock) forced induction conversion using a Garrett GT3076R turbocharger (0.82 A/R, 62mm inducer) with a custom 3-inch stainless steel turbo manifold by Tomei, paired with a GReddy Type-S intercooler (600hp core) and a HKS SSQV4 blow-off valve for precise boost control up to 12 psi

Full fuel system upgrade including Injector Dynamics ID1000x injectors (1000cc/min), Walbro 450LPH in-tank fuel pump, and a Radium Engineering dual catch can setup to prevent oil buildup in the VQ35DE’s PCV system, paired with a Motec M150 ECU for standalone engine management and flex-fuel compatibility

Drivetrain reinforcement with a Spec Stage 3+ clutch (multi-disc, 800 lb-ft capacity) and a Cusco 1.5-way mechanical LSD for the FX35’s FM56 rear differential, alongside a Z1 Motorsports aluminum driveshaft to handle increased torque, and a set of BC Racing BR coilovers (8kg/mm front, 10kg/mm rear) with Swift springs for aggressive cornering
estetica: Liberty Walk LB-FX35 widebody kit with custom carbon fiber fenders (3.5-inch flares) and a custom front splitter by Rocket Bunny, paired with a Seibon carbon fiber hood (VQ35DE-specific cutouts) to reduce weight and improve aerodynamics

Custom 3M Matte Military Green wrap with gloss black accents on the roof and mirrors, combined with a set of Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels (20x10 +20 front, 20x11 +25 rear) in a matte bronze finish, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (275/35/20 front, 295/30/20 rear) for maximum grip

Interior overhaul featuring a full Bride Zeta III seat setup (fixed-back, FIA-approved) with custom FX35-specific mounting brackets, a Nardi Classic 380mm steering wheel with a Works Bell quick-release hub, and a full Alcantara headliner and door cards by Eurokraft, paired with a custom roll cage by Hard Dog Motorsports (8-point, bolt-in)
